title: Industrial Base Policy
text:
Mission
To ensure hardy, resilient U.S. Defense supply chains, reduce reliance on foreign manufacturing, and correct domestic shortfalls in the defense industrial base.
Vision
A full suite of authorities and investment mechanisms to enable the DoD to complement and fully leverage private and industry investments for national security.
What We Do
The Defense Production Act Investments (DPAI) Office provides direction and guidance to ensure availability of industrial resources for national defense. Through the Defense Priorities and Allocations Systems (DPAS) and financial incentives like purchases, purchase commitments, loans, and loan guarantees, the office engages with domestic companies to prioritize orders and shore up areas where critical industrial capacity is insufficient to meet U.S. defense and commercial needs.
